narrative:
York (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,137 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
